description_long: This is a compact electronic keyboard with a bright red rectangular body and a set of white and black piano-style keys occupying the front half of the top surface. The keyboard features several round and rectangular control knobs and buttons, mostly black and white, arranged on the upper right and left sections, along with a single slider and a circular dial. The casing appears to be made of plastic, with a smooth, slightly glossy finish, and the keys are evenly spaced and slightly raised above the surface. The rear and side panels are plain, with no visible ports or connectors, suggesting a simplified or stylized design. The object is relatively low in height and wide in its longest dimension, typical of portable synthesizer keyboards. Its overall appearance is modern and minimalistic, suitable for use in music studios, street performances, or urban recreational spaces.
description: A compact red electronic keyboard with white and black keys, multiple control knobs, and a modern, minimalistic design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full set of piano keys and all control knobs and buttons clearly.
description_view_1: Angled left view highlighting the depth of the keyboard and the arrangement of controls on the top surface.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the plain back panel and the tops of the keys and controls.
description_view_3: Angled right view focusing on the right-side controls and the side profile of the keyboard.
